title: polygala calliptera
intro: Polygala calliptera, also known as Yin Yang Huo, is a type of plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. It is a traditional Chinese herb used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to improve immune function and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Polygala calliptera include its ability to enhance physical performance, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala calliptera is often combined with other herbs to make teas, capsules, or decoctions that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
